design_philosophy.core_loop: Catch colored tiles from conveyor belt, arrange them into matching horizontal/vertical/diagonal lines (Klaxs) of three or more tiles to clear them and earn points
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Managing limited paddle capacity (5 tiles) and well depth (25 tiles total across 5 columns) while responding to incoming tile stream; strategic tile placement vs. reactive catching
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Execute precise tile-matching combinations with cascading effects; master spatial puzzle solving under time pressure
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Hybrid of Tetris-style conveyor mechanics with tic-tac-toe matching logic; emphasis on combo rewards for multi-line clears from single tile drops; wave-based progression with player-chosen difficulty branches rather than linear advancement

difficulty.lives_system: Drop-based system: player permitted cumulative drops across all waves; one drop penalty for each tile that falls off conveyor or is lost; game ends when drop quota exhausted
difficulty.continues_system: No traditional continue system; wave selection offers difficulty branching—choosing later waves in each 5-wave group awards bonus points and additional drops, allowing skilled players to mitigate penalty pressure
difficulty.checkpointing: Drop meter resets after every fifth wave; player given three wave options at reset points, creating decision checkpoints
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: High: players actively choose wave difficulty progression; later-wave selection increases drop allowance but raises scoring/performance thresholds per wave

progression.unlock_mechanism: 100 waves organized into 20 groups of 5 waves each; after every fifth wave, player selects next wave from three options, with later options in group being harder but more rewarding
replayability_hooks: Wave selection branching creates multiple progression paths through 100 waves
Bonus points for later-wave selection encourages skill-based difficulty scaling
Bonus scoring for multi-Klax combos and cascades incentivizes pattern recognition mastery
Tile-on-conveyor and well-space bonuses reward efficient play efficiency optimization
